     The Numbers Business Report

Molly’s Game (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $28,780,744Details
International Box Office $31,477,611
Worldwide Box Office $60,258,355
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $859,592
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,150,046
Total $3,009,638
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The true story of Molly Bloom, an Olympic-class skier who ran the world’s most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested in the middle of the night by 17 FBI agents wielding automatic weapons. Her players included Hollywood royalty, sports stars, business titans and finally, unbeknownst to her, the Russian mob. Her only ally was her criminal defense lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learned that there was much more to Molly than the tabloids led us to believe.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$2,349,967 (8.2% of total gross)
Legs:4.20 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:271 opening theaters/1,708 max. theaters, 4.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $37,894,781

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 25th, 2017 (Limited) by STX Entertainment
January 5th, 2018 (Expands Wide) by STX Entertainment
International Releases: December 22nd, 2017 (Wide) (Netherlands)
January 5th, 2018 (Wide), released as Molly a jej hra (Slovakia)
January 5th, 2018 (Wide), released as Molly's Game (United Kingdom)
January 5th, 2018 (Wide) (Spain)
January 5th, 2018 (Wide) (France)
Video Release: March 27th, 2018 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for language, drug content and some violence.
(Rating bulletin 2502 (Cert #51191), 11/15/2017)
Running Time: 140 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Autobiographical, Intertitle, Voiceover/Narration
Plot point: Biography, Dysfunctional Family, FBI, Gambling, Infidelity, Non-Chronological, Russian Mafia, Skiing, Sports Injury
Social setting: Olympics
Subgenre: Courtroom / Legal Drama
Source:Based on Factual Book/Article
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Entertainment One, Pascal Pictures, The Mark Gordon Company
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

The true story of Molly Bloom, an Olympic-class skier who ran the world’s most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested in the middle of the night by 17 FBI agents wielding automatic weapons. Her players included Hollywood royalty, sports stars, business titans and finally, unbeknownst to her, the Russian mob. Her only ally was her criminal defense lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learned that there was much more to Molly than the tabloids led us to believe.
